common.tagline: Your travel project, in good hands.

trust.verifiedAdvisors: {count, plural, =0 {No verified advisors yet} =1 {1 verified advisor} other {# verified advisors}}

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You must be signed in to access this page.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.networkError: The server is not responding. Please try again shortly.

overview.title: My compliance file
overview.subtitle: Current status and submitted documents.
overview.noDossier: No compliance file has been opened yet. Start by submitting your documents.

submit.title: Submit my compliance file
submit.intro: Upload your provincial certificate (CCV or TICO) and proof of affiliation with an agency holding a valid permit.
submit.step1Description: Per Law 25 (Quebec), we require your explicit consent to process your compliance documents.
submit.consentLabel: I consent to Conseiller Voyage processing my compliance documents for verification.
submit.documentFile: Document (PDF, JPG, PNG, HEIC, max 5 MB)
submit.proofFile: Affiliation proof (PDF, JPG, PNG, HEIC, max 5 MB)
submit.step4Description: Verify the information before submission. Once submitted, an administrator will review your file within 5 business days.
submit.successMessage: Your file has been received. You will be notified by email once an administrator has reviewed it.
submit.errorMinCertificates: At least one certificate is required.
submit.errorMinAffiliations: At least one affiliation is required.
submit.errorInvalidFileType: Unsupported file type. Use PDF, JPG, PNG or HEIC.
submit.errorExpiresBeforeIssued: Expiry date must be after the issue date.

detail.title: Submission {submissionId}
detail.approveSuccess: Submission approved. The advisor will move to verified status.
detail.refuseReasonHelp: At least 20 characters. Will be communicated to the advisor.
detail.refuseReasonTooShort: Reason must contain at least 20 characters.
detail.refuseSuccess: Submission refused. The advisor can re-submit.
detail.alreadyDecided: This submission has already been decided.

approved.subject: Your compliance file has been approved
approved.body: Your compliance file submitted on {submittedAt} has been approved by our team.
approved.bodyWithComment: Your compliance file submitted on {submittedAt} has been approved by our team. Administrator comment: {comment}
approved.footer: Conseiller Voyage — all your data is hosted in Canada (Law 25).

refused.subject: Your compliance file requires corrections
refused.body: Your compliance file submitted on {submittedAt} cannot be validated as-is.
refused.footer: Conseiller Voyage — all your data is hosted in Canada (Law 25).
